basic_information.insured_name: Full name of the primary insured person.
basic_information.address: Full address of the insured person.
basic_information.policy_period: Duration of the policy in months (e.g., '12', '6').

program_pricing_matrix.lob: The specific line of business or coverage type this pricing entry applies to (e.g., Property, General Liability, Auto). Must align with the proposal's coverage sections.
program_pricing_matrix.carrier: The insurance carrier or market providing the quoted terms for this line of business.
program_pricing_matrix.base_premium_usd: The quoted premium amount in ($CAD) before adding any taxes, fees, or optional charges.
program_pricing_matrix.terrorism_premium_usd: The additional premium amount (if any) charged for terrorism coverage, either mandatory or optional depending on the LOB.
program_pricing_matrix.all_in_premium_usd: The total premium in USD for this line of business, including all mandatory surcharges, policy fees, and the terrorism premium if applicable — but before applying provincial taxes.
program_pricing_matrix.notes: Free-text field for remarks, assumptions, underwriting comments, or any special conditions relevant to this pricing line (e.g., WELs, deductibles, subjectivities).

co_insured.name: Full name of the co-insured person.
co_insured.relationship: Relationship of the co-insured person to the insured person.

driver_info.middle_name: Middle name of the driver (or empty string if unavailable).

vehicle_info.model: Model name using only the make and base model of the vehicle (exactly two words, ignore trims or variants). Example: 'KIA K5', 'BMW X3', 'HONDA ACCORD'.
vehicle_info.primary_use: Purpose of use - must be one of: 'Commute' or 'Pleasure' (choose the closest match).

coverage.coverage_type: Name of the coverage type (e.g., 'Bodily Injury Liability', 'Property Damage Liability', 'Comprehensive', 'Collision', 'Uninsured Motorist') applied to this vehicle.
coverage.coverage_value: Coverage limit and/or deductible. Format varies by coverage type: For liability coverages use 'limit/limit' format (e.g., '100000/300000' for per person/per accident). For deductibles use single amount (e.g., '500', '1000'). For coverages with both, separate with space (e.g., '50000 limit, 250 deductible').

premium_breakdown_per_vehicles.vehicle_name: Full vehicle identifier using year, make, and base model (exactly three words). Example: '2025 KIA K5', '2023 BMW X3'.
premium_breakdown_per_vehicles.premium_amount: Insurance premium amount for this specific vehicle (numeric string, e.g., '1234.56').

discounts_applied: Names of discounts applied to the policy.
Auto.conclusion: A brief summary of the policy highlighting key benefits, notable discounts, coverage strengths, or any important policy details (2-3 sentences).

basic_information.insured_name: Full name of the primary insured person.
basic_information.address: Full address of the insured person.
basic_information.policy_period: Duration of the policy in months (e.g., '12', '6').

program_pricing_matrix.lob: The specific line of business or coverage type this pricing entry applies to (e.g., Property, General Liability, Auto). Must align with the proposal's coverage sections.
program_pricing_matrix.carrier: The insurance carrier or market providing the quoted terms for this line of business.
program_pricing_matrix.base_premium_usd: The quoted premium amount in ($CAD) before adding any taxes, fees, or optional charges.
program_pricing_matrix.terrorism_premium_usd: The additional premium amount (if any) charged for terrorism coverage, either mandatory or optional depending on the LOB.
program_pricing_matrix.all_in_premium_usd: The total premium in USD for this line of business, including all mandatory surcharges, policy fees, and the terrorism premium if applicable — but before applying provincial taxes.
program_pricing_matrix.notes: Free-text field for remarks, assumptions, underwriting comments, or any special conditions relevant to this pricing line (e.g., WELs, deductibles, subjectivities).

co_insured.name: Full name of the co-insured person.
co_insured.relationship: Relationship of the co-insured person to the insured person.

property_details.square_footage: Total square footage of the property (numeric string, e.g., '2500', '3200').
property_details.year_roof_updated: Year when the roof was last updated or replaced (e.g., '2018', '2022').
property_details.construction_type: Type of construction material used (e.g., 'Frame', 'Masonry', 'Brick', 'Wood Frame').

deductible.deductible_type: Type or name of the deductible.
deductible.deductible_value: Deductible amount as numeric or percentage depending on structure.

additional_coverages.coverage_limit: Maximum coverage amount for this additional coverage.
additional_coverages.coverage_deductible: Deductible amount for this coverage if applicable.

discount_applied: Name of the discounts applied to the policy.
Home.conclusion: A brief summary of the policy highlighting key benefits, notable discounts, coverage strengths, property protection features, or any important policy details (2-3 sentences).
